meta.title: Ecosystem | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Explore the Quantum Shield ecosystem - an integrated platform protecting crypto assets with quantum-resistant technology

hero.title: Protect Your Crypto Assets
hero.description: Quantum Shield is a comprehensive security ecosystem built for the quantum computing era. NIST-certified quantum-resistant cryptography and our L3 chain protect your assets.

about.title: What is Quantum Shield?
about.description: Quantum Shield is a protocol that protects crypto assets from future quantum computer attacks. Lock ETH and secure it with NIST-certified quantum-resistant signatures (Dilithium / SPHINCS+). A 24-hour timelock detects and prevents unauthorized unlocks.

lock.title: 1. Lock Your Assets
lock.description: Deposit ETH into L1 Vault. Authenticate with Dilithium signature so only you can unlock.

protect.title: 2. Quantum Protection
protect.description: 5 Provers approve with 2/5 threshold signatures (SPHINCS+). VRF random selection prevents collusion.

unlock.title: 3. Safe Unlock
unlock.description: Receive assets after 24-hour timelock. Observers monitor during this period to detect fraud.

quantumSafe.title: Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
quantumSafe.description: Only NIST FIPS-certified Dilithium + SPHINCS+ + SHA3-256

selfCustody.title: Self-Custody
selfCustody.description: Private keys exist only on your device. Never stored by the system

transparent.title: Transparency
transparent.description: All operations recorded and verifiable on-chain

q1.question: Why is quantum resistance necessary?
q1.answer: ECDSA signatures used in current blockchains could be broken by future quantum computers using Shor's algorithm. Quantum Shield uses NIST-certified quantum-resistant algorithms (Dilithium, SPHINCS+) to protect assets from future threats.

q2.question: Can the 24-hour waiting period be shortened?
q2.answer: No. The 24-hour timelock is hardcoded in the smart contract and immutable. This is an essential security requirement that ensures time to protect assets if unauthorized access occurs.

q3.question: What happens if Provers don't respond?
q3.answer: If no signatures are received from Provers for 72 hours, the emergency unlock path is automatically triggered. Deposit an emergency bond (0.5 ETH + 5% of amount) and recover assets after a 7-day monitoring period.

q4.question: Where are private keys stored?
q4.answer: Your private keys (Dilithium keypair) exist only on your device. They are never stored by Quantum Shield's system. This is the self-custody principle.

q5.question: What happens when an Observer's challenge is approved?
q5.answer: When a challenge is approved, the misbehaving Prover is slashed (penalized). 60% of the slashed amount goes to the Observer as a reward, 20% to the insurance pool, and 20% is burned.

cta.title: Start Using Quantum Shield
cta.description: Protect your assets with quantum-resistant technology today. Dilithium signatures protect your crypto from future threats.
